subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Maryam 2
subcodes.first_line: O Maryam! Exchange thy sorrow for happiness and drink thy sadness from the cup of joy. Shouldst thou desire to enter the path of search, thou must needs be patient
subcodes.first_line_orig: مریما عیسی جان بلامکان عروج نمود قفس وجود از طیر محمود خالی ماند بلبل قدم
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @pain of love; love as veil, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
